testcase.name: test_otel_export_smoke_subprocess

failure.message:
AssertionError: Traceback (most recent call last): File "<string>", line 2, in <module> File "A:\Thesis-Code	hesis-sally-repo\sally\core\__init__.py", line 10, in <module> from .event_bus import Event, EventHandler, EventBus File "A:\Thesis-Code	hesis-sally-repo\sally\core\event_bus.py", line 52, in <module> logger = get_logger(__name__) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "A:\Thesis-Code	hesis-sally-repo\sally\core\logger.py", line 433, in get_logger return getLogger(name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "A:\Thesis-Code	hesis-sally-repo\sally\core\logger.py", line 451, in getLogger return _get_factory().get_logger(name or "sally") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "A:\Thesis-Code	hesis-sally-repo\sally\core\logger.py", line 428, in _get_factory _factory = LoggerFactory() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "A:\Thesis-Code	hesis-sally-repo\sally\core\logger.py", line 275, in __init__ self._setup_defaults() File "A:\Thesis-Code	hesis-sally-repo\sally\core\logger.py", line 280, in _setup_defaults cfg = get_config() ^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "A:\Thesis-Code	hesis-sally-repo\sally\core\config.py", line 884, in get_config _config_instance = ConfigManager(environment=environment) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "A:\Thesis-Code	hesis-sally-repo\sally\core\config.py", line 501, in __init__ self._load_config() File "A:\Thesis-Code	hesis-sally-repo\sally\core\config.py", line 529, in _load_config self._load_env_vars() File "A:\Thesis-Code	hesis-sally-repo\sally\core\config.py", line 607, in _load_env_vars setattr(env_cfg, key, int(env_value) if env_value else None) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ValueError: invalid literal for int() with base 10: 'None'
assert 1 == 0 + where 1 = CompletedProcess(args=['A:\Thesis-Code\thesis-sally-repo\.venv\Scripts\python.exe', '-c', "import time
from sall... else None)
 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
ValueError: invalid literal for int() with base 10: 'None'
').returncode

testcase.failure:
tests\integration	est_observability_otel_e2e.py:64: in test_otel_export_smoke_subprocess assert completed.returncode == 0, completed.stderr E AssertionError: Traceback (most recent call last): E File "<string>", line 2, in <module> E File "A:\Thesis-Code	hesis-sally-repo\sally\core\__init__.py", line 10, in <module> E from .event_bus import Event, EventHandler, EventBus E File "A:\Thesis-Code	hesis-sally-repo\sally\core\event_bus.py", line 52, in <module> E logger = get_logger(__name__) E ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E File "A:\Thesis-Code	hesis-sally-repo\sally\core\logger.py", line 433, in get_logger E return getLogger(name) E ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E File "A:\Thesis-Code	hesis-sally-repo\sally\core\logger.py", line 451, in getLogger E return _get_factory().get_logger(name or "sally") E ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E File "A:\Thesis-Code	hesis-sally-repo\sally\core\logger.py", line 428, in _get_factory E _factory = LoggerFactory() E ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E File "A:\Thesis-Code	hesis-sally-repo\sally\core\logger.py", line 275, in __init__ E self._setup_defaults() E File "A:\Thesis-Code	hesis-sally-repo\sally\core\logger.py", line 280, in _setup_defaults E cfg = get_config() E ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E File "A:\Thesis-Code	hesis-sally-repo\sally\core\config.py", line 884, in get_config E _config_instance = ConfigManager(environment=environment) E ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E File "A:\Thesis-Code	hesis-sally-repo\sally\core\config.py", line 501, in __init__ E self._load_config() E File "A:\Thesis-Code	hesis-sally-repo\sally\core\config.py", line 529, in _load_config E self._load_env_vars() E File "A:\Thesis-Code	hesis-sally-repo\sally\core\config.py", line 607, in _load_env_vars E setattr(env_cfg, key, int(env_value) if env_value else None) E ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E ValueError: invalid literal for int() with base 10: 'None' E E assert 1 == 0 E + where 1 = CompletedProcess(args=['A:\Thesis-Code\thesis-sally-repo\.venv\Scripts\python.exe', '-c', "import time
from sall... else None)
 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
ValueError: invalid literal for int() with base 10: 'None'
').returncode
